title: Some Random Stuff Mod
description:
I just tried to make a mod with some random stuff, but the main goal of this mod is to make the Mushroom Islands more useful. 
New animals, blocks, recipes and plants.
body:
# First Mod
This Mod adds several new Animals and Blocks. The main focus of this mod is to add new features to the Mushroom Islands. There are some features that have no function at this moment.



## Mushroom Island Features:
Minimushroom (red head): Spawns like the Mushroom Cow and has no real function,
Minitrader (green head): just like the Minimushroom, but you can trade with him




## New Blocks: 
with 4 brown mushrooms, you can craft Mushroomplanks (act like normal planks),
Barreldoor: Looks like  2 Barrels, no real function,
Mushroomchest: this chest has just 18 Slots, its for beginners and can be crafted with 8 Mushroomplanks



## New Animals (have no functions yet):
Penguin, Grizzly Bear, Crocodile, Beaver



## New Mushrooms: 
spawn in the Birch Forests
